name: hunger
definition: The urgency to eat food and restore fullness. A higher internal value means the NPC is more hungry.

name: thirst
definition: The urgency to drink and restore hydration. A higher internal value means the NPC is more thirsty.

name: rest
definition: The urgency to recover from physical or mental fatigue.

name: comfort
definition: The urgency to improve physical ease, pleasantness, support, and shelter.

name: entertainment
definition: The urgency to reduce boredom through enjoyable or engaging activity.

name: social
definition: The urgency to interact, communicate, or feel socially connected with other people.

name: safety
definition: The urgency to reduce exposure to danger, uncertainty, or threatening environmental conditions.

name: curiosity
definition: The urgency to discover, inspect, explore, or learn something new.

name: bladder
definition: The urgency to relieve bladder pressure by using a toilet. A value of 0 means no need to use the toilet, while a value of 1 means critically urgent.

name: hygiene
definition: The urgency to restore personal cleanliness, including washing, showering, brushing teeth, and similar care.

name: physical_activity
definition: The urgency to move, stretch, walk, exercise, or otherwise use the body after inactivity.

name: mental_activity
definition: The urgency for cognitive stimulation through thinking, problem-solving, learning, planning, memory, or mentally challenging activity.
